description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: deploy and release, and define variables DATA_ZIP_API_URL and PROJECT_API that reference the project API. In the deploy stage add a data_zip job using the alpine image, triggered only on tag commits, that runs apk add -U make git zip curl, then make data_zip, echoes $DATA_ZIP_API_URL, and uploads _build/postgresql_anonymizer_data_en_US.zip and _build/postgresql_anonymizer_data_fr_FR.zip to $DATA_ZIP_API_URL via curl with the JOB-TOKEN, and stores the _build directory as an artifact. In the release stage add a release_anon job using the registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli:latest image, also triggered only on tag commits, that creates a GitLab release with tag_name and description set to $CI_COMMIT_TAG and attaches the two zip files as package assets (English and French datasets) using the URLs $DATA_ZIP_API_URL/... , and runs a simple echo script. Ensure both jobs run only when a Git tag is present.
